description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script `ls -l` on every job using the default runner image. Define a single job named build_gfeatures that runs in the default test stage, executes the command `./gradlew`, and produces artifacts named `gFeatures_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}` containing the `build/libs` directory without including untracked files. No additional stages, caches, services, variables, or rules are defined.
